config.Kconfig:
config QAPP_HELLO_WORLD_DEMO_FUNC
    bool "Enable hello world demo"
    default n
config.quecos_apps_config:
/**
 * Hello world demo config define
 */
#cmakedefine CONFIG_QAPP_HELLO_WORLD_DEMO_FUNC
config.show_view:
# Customer apps
message("
Customer Apps")
message(STATUS "CONFIG_QAPP_HELLO_WORLD_DEMO_FUNC ------------------------- ${CONFIG_QAPP_HELLO_WORLD_DEMO_FUNC}")

config.Kconfig:
config QAPP_NETWORK_DEMO_FUNC
    bool "UniRTOS network demo"
    depends on QOSA_NW_FUNC
    default n

config QAPP_UART_DEMO_FUNC
    bool "UniRTOS uart demo"
    default n

config QAPP_VFS_DEMO_FUNC
    bool "UniRTOS vfs demo"
    depends on QOSA_VFS_FILESYSTEM_FUNC
    default n

config QAPP_QURL_HTTP_DEMO_FUNC
    bool "UniRTOS qurl http demo"
    depends on QCM_QURL_FUNC
    default n
config.quecos_apps_config:
/**
 * qurl http demo function support
 */
#cmakedefine CONFIG_QAPP_QURL_HTTP_DEMO_FUNC
